testFrameworkFixes.issue: Test executor timeout mechanism was broken - tests reported 'Test timeout' in 1ms
testFrameworkFixes.rootCause: Test executor trying to run 'node dist/cli/index.js provider status' but global 'neurolink' command was different
testFrameworkFixes.solution: Changed spawn command to use global 'neurolink' command instead of local build
testFrameworkFixes.pattern: Always use global CLI commands in test framework for reliable execution

timeoutHandling.issue: Inadequate timeout values causing false failures
timeoutHandling.solution: Set appropriate timeouts: CLI tests (60s), provider commands (300-360s)
timeoutHandling.pattern: Provider status checks take ~15 seconds, plan timeouts accordingly

testOrganization.pattern: Keep testing infrastructure in dedicated scripts directory with clear documentation

commandExecution.testFramework: Use global neurolink command vs local dist/cli/index.js
commandExecution.environmentLoading: CLI automatically loads .env files - no manual export needed

comprehensiveTestResults.executionPattern: Parallel execution with 10 concurrent tests max
comprehensiveTestResults.successCriteria: All core functionality verified through manual testing
comprehensiveTestResults.keyLearning: Test framework success != actual functionality - manual verification essential

projectCleanup.gitignoreUpdated: Added comprehensive patterns for test execution outputs
projectCleanup.documentationComplete: All learnings captured in memory bank

manualVerificationSuccess.mcpIntegration: ✅ Working - MCP tools execute and return clean responses
manualVerificationSuccess.mcpStreaming: ✅ Working - MCP with streaming provides real-time AI-generated responses
manualVerificationSuccess.providerStatus: ✅ Working - accurately reports provider connectivity status

keyTechnicalInsights.testExecutorDebugging: False timeout reports were executor bugs, not actual command timeouts
keyTechnicalInsights.globalCommandUsage: Global 'neurolink' command more reliable than local builds in testing
keyTechnicalInsights.timeoutReality: Real command execution takes seconds, not minutes - test framework was the issue
keyTechnicalInsights.manualVsAutomated: Manual verification proved all functionality working despite test framework issues
